Prediction: Yes

Reasoning:
The patient has an explicit diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia" in the current visit record. This directly meets the criterion for strong and explicit evidence of a lipid disorder. Furthermore, the patient is on multiple lipid-lowering medications (Simvastatin, Atorvastatin, Gemfibrozil, Ezetimibe), which indicates active management of a lipid disorder. Therefore, it is highly likely that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
